title: scripting: unbounded stderr collection in hook execution
description:
Lines 65-66: stdout is capped at 65KB but stderr is unbounded. A runaway hook script that writes to stderr can exhaust bot memory.

Cost: Denial of service vector. Hook script writing gigabytes to stderr will OOM the bot.

Fix: Cap stderr to same 65KB limit as stdout. Requires refactor to not consume all output into String before truncating.
